_comment: Web-researched details for products. Keys must match the slug (lowercase, hyphenated product name). The auto-generate script merges this with Documentation/Product Matrix.xlsx by slug. Products without an entry here will NOT appear on the site.

companion-pet-pup.blurb: A lifelike animatronic puppy with soft fur, BarkBack technology, and a soothing heartbeat. Designed with feedback from caregivers to bring comfort to older adults.

companion-pet-cat.blurb: An animatronic cat that purrs, meows, and rolls over for tummy scratches. Studies show it reduces feelings of loneliness and dementia-related agitation.

matecat-pro.blurb: A hyper-realistic robotic cat with voice wake-up, blinking, purring, and tail movement. Responds to custom voice commands like "Love U" or "Good night".

metacat.blurb: An AI-powered companion cat with LED-screen eyes, 29 voice commands, and Type-C charging. Up to 10 hours of playtime per charge.

ebo-air-2-plus.blurb: A mobile AI robot companion with a 3K camera, two-way video, ChatGPT-powered chat mode, and auto-recharge. Patrols your home and engages with family.
